title: Number of Subsequences That Satisfy the Given Sum Condition
hints: Sort the array first. This lets you easily identify the minimum and maximum elements of any subsequence by picking indices from the sorted list.
Fix the minimum element at index i and the maximum at index j. If nums[i] + nums[j] <= target, how many valid subsequences can be formed using elements strictly between i and j?
For a fixed pair (i, j) where i < j, the elements between them can either be included or excluded. Use powers of 2 to count these combinations efficiently.
